react_icons.reason: Official Airtel mark for banking service branding
AI provider logo for the Claude integration

downloaded_assets.title: Modern Finance Office
downloaded_assets.description: Bright, professional office space with clean workstations and gray tones.
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A wide shot of a modern open-plan office. Sleek white desks with dual monitors, ergonomic black mesh chairs, and large windows letting in abundant natural light. The palette is dominated by professional grays, whites, and soft metallic tones.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Dominant: Clean white (#FFFFFF), Light gray (#E0E0E0), Charcoal (#333333). Matches the Airtel-inspired theme perfectly.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Perfectly captures the 'trusted modern banking' vibe with a clean, high-end professional look that won't distract from the UI.

downloaded_assets.title: Luxury Financial Interior
downloaded_assets.description: Sophisticated warm-toned office interior for a high-end banking feel.
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Close-up of a stylish modern office with luxury furniture and soft ambient lighting. Neutral gray and beige tones provide a calm, premium atmosphere.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Warm grays and soft beiges. Works well as a sophisticated background.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Alternative for a warmer, more executive feel if the bright office is too sterile.

downloaded_assets.title: Subtle Gray Texture
downloaded_assets.description: Very soft gray gradient texture for card backgrounds.
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Extremely subtle abstract gray texture with soft geometric lines and soft gradients.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Light grays and off-whites. Extremely neutral.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Provides a tactile, premium feel to cards without adding visual clutter.

downloaded_assets.title: Airtel Payments Bank Logo
downloaded_assets.description: Official logo for Airtel Payments Bank.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Official brand mark requested for the app upgrade.

downloaded_assets.title: Verified Banking Shield
downloaded_assets.description: A crisp, professional shield icon representing trust and safety.
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A geometric shield-like mark, clean and symmetrical.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Chosen for its strong 'shield' silhouette which conveys security in a banking context.

downloaded_assets.title: News Globe Icon
downloaded_assets.description: A minimalist globe icon for news or global finance sections.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Clean, circular globe icon that matches the modern banking aesthetic.

css_textures.description: Subtle radial mesh gradient for a modern fintech look.
Tactile noise texture to give a premium feel to cards.

usage_notes: Primary Red (#D40000) should be used for primary buttons and accents.
Use hero-bank-office-2.jpg as the main hero image for its bright, trusted feel.
Texture-gray-gradient.jpg should be applied as a subtle background to cards at low opacity (0.1-0.2).
